textByHash.1b78401d7e79c31b27012391ba4a4d1f011a3837: In their attempt to claim the artefact, they used magic they did not understand. The rift to the Scar was created as a result.
textByHash.1f3a87d0775a17c022b08d70c60716e92b9e98be: I must conserve my power. The portal to the Runic Altar of Water has closed.
textByHash.2859827003094229ce0eaec75a1b27636206933b: You are mistaken. While it is true that teleportation magic is strong here, that is only a side effect of this temple's history.
textByHash.630a5933de23d2d855fcc304fd847e166a13d292: Now, the power of the Abyss grows. The rift will soon reopen once more. Those of you staying should prepare yourselves.
textByHash.649654615b2c3ca436a58ff2fba952a94123baf2: Humans, use the cells. Protect me while I close the rift.
textByHash.651a5eab8fc8c1c76850fa63bfbcc1d118b99977: Human, I need the power of the guardian stones.
textByHash.6b7d66175ea50c07e17f6b49a8d9121487e2f608: That was a rift into an area of the Abyss known as the Scar.
textByHash.74f61af7d29d027e19cce3ed27d0aec11b6fafaa: This temple was built to house a powerful artefact. Many sought to claim this artefact for themselves, including servants of the Fallen Empire.
textByHash.835705e43480819d1dc65bb0fb6ccf0054df21f0: And so the rift to the Scar is open once more. Humans, fight with us. Let us hold back the Abyss!
textByHash.86564830b557fb22c32b9b16e4db55269ce694c9: I shall now use power from the Abyss to open a portal to the Runic Altar of Water.
textByHash.9493716acbf0b668e11744cb58deeeb3c92d9d59: You are correct. The Eye was removed after the battle, but not before the Justiciar of the Lion used it to seal the rift once more.
textByHash.98773b4e0b386788d262861e5284c56eea88163c: Humans, I now have the power to close the rift. Thank you, brave ones.
textByHash.9adc33737e86b439f1a9cd02d7919ab6951e98a3: My power level is too low. Bring me guardian stones.
textByHash.a423cd902f6ed811958f7d9a925fc56d57298fc3: Incorrect. Without the power of the Eye, we have no way to seal the rift permanently. It will soon reopen once more. You should leave before that happens.
textByHash.a9538a9205e85ec3b10de5aaff205ea798f9de88: Humans, I lack the power needed to close the rift! I require runic energy!
textByHash.b94368934f9b36d0332f4d4caa6360bca884753d: I shall now use power from the Abyss to open a portal to the Runic Altar of Mind.
textByHash.c1a68c41dee5fc1f3273647041ba4c4d8b41d0ab: Humans, I now have the power to close the rift. Brace yourselves!
textByHash.c4d5b88aa4ddb90b23fd99d11f9c3a107565002a: No part of the Abyss is more dangerous than the Scar. Your friend will have already been consumed.
textByHash.c4e4bd2646a8ed2d9734f2d7f7c18e295f5ff42b: Human, the stones have fueled me, but more are needed.
textByHash.d0d1e23d86c22826cba2d7a38c2efb676da9d966: Now, I shall rest until it opens once more...
textByHash.de9ec824945e967294982280bcd05f7e0565ad27: She then created us, the Guardians of the Rift, to protect this place in the event the rift was ever reopened.
textByHash.e13229b374fe25e9e5455c036ce83016358c895d: Now, for the final blow. Let the Scar be no more!
textByHash.e9ff660f1081bc28323e2f3db4e6b1fa797890cb: Thanks, adventurer. I am now fully powered up.
